1PM CBB: Eastern Michigan Vs. Bowling Green
Picks:
EMU +12.5 -134 5U (Dk)
EMU TTO 64.5 -115 3U (DK)
BGSU TTU 76.5 -104 3U (FD)
EMU 1H +6.5 -110 3U (DK)
EMU ML +540 1U (FD)
1PM CBB: Eastern Michigan Vs. Bowling Green

Through the lost five to ten seasons, Bowling Green has been the
much better team when compored to their MAC rival in Eastern Michigan.
As a result, they hove won eight of the last ten meetings between these
two programs. Because of that long term dominance, the market
continues to treat Bowling Green as the superior side whenever these
teams meet. However, the recent results tell a different story. Through the
last three meetings, Eastern Michigan has flipped the script, winning two
of those matchups and proving that this rivalry has become far more
competitive. As these teams meet for the first time this season, the
current matchup profile strongly suggests we are in for onother Eastem
Michigan performance thot exceeds morket expectations.

in conference play this season, Eastem Michigan is averaging 72 PPG
‘while shooting 45 percent from the field and 33 percent from thrae pont
range. They aro generating offense on 56 field gool ottempts per game
ond converting 6 made threes per contest. Today, oll of those numbers
ore positioned to rise against a Bowling Green defense that hos been
extremely leaky in MAC ploy, Bowling Green is surrendering 49 percent
shooting from the field ond 37 percent from three point range in
conference, while allowing 67 field goal attempts ond on alarming 10
made threes per gome. Thot defensive profile has resuked in 85 PPG
allowed, and it now faces an Eastern Michigan offense that is already
producing efficiently without needing extreme volume. This matchup sets
up for EMU to see cleaner looks, increased perimeter success, and an
offensive output that Is set to climb.

On the other side of the ball, Bowling Green is averaging 82 PPG in
conference play while shooting 47 percent from the field and 33 percent
from three point ronge. Despite that scoring average, their efficiency
ceiling is now capped by a disciplined Eastem Michigan defense. EMU Is
surrendering just 43 percent shooting from the fieki and an olite 26
percent from throe point range in conference, while allowing only 6.5
made threes per game. Eastern Michigan is giving up just 70 PPG despite
allovring opponents to hoist os many os 60 field goo! attempts per game.
Today, that defense faces a Bowling Green offense posting just 59 fieid
geal attempts, placing Bowling Green scoring family on the deciine as
efficiency becomes much harder to sustain.

Through their first six conference gomes this season, Eastem
Michigan has gone 3-3 stroight up while posting a strong 4-2 ATS
record, consistently outperforming market expectations. On the other
side, Bowling Green has significantly underperformed through
conference play, going just 2-3 both straight up and agoinst the spread.
With Eastern Michigan owning the defensive edge, matching up well
offensively, and trending in the right direction through conference play,
they ore in position to hang comfortably within this inflated number from
the opening tip.
